REQUIREMENT REPORT

Role  
Elderly Person  
Requirement ID  
FR-01  
Requirement Title  
User Input Interface for Daily Checklists  
Requirement Description  
The system shall provide a daily checklist interface for elderly users to record activities such as going to bed, waking up, visitors, door openings, going out, and returning home.  
Citation  
Page 8, Section 4.3.1  
Requirement Related Title  
Data Collection Tools  

Role  
Elderly Person  
Requirement ID  
FR-02  
Requirement Title  
Visualization Tool for Carer UI  
Requirement Description  
The system shall include a touchscreen system enabling remotely caring for the occupant via remote in-home activity sensing and notifications, allowing carers to check on user activity and receive customizable reports summarizing user behaviour.  
Citation  
Page 7, Section 4.1  
Requirement Related Title  
SofiHub Features  

Role  
Elderly Person  
Requirement ID  
FR-03  
Requirement Title  
Human-in-the-Loop Feedback Mechanism for Reminders  
Requirement Description  
The system shall issue user-specific reminders such as appointments, special events, hydration, and medication reminders that can be triggered by user activity, providing auditory feedback through morning messages and medication reminders.  
Citation  
Page 7, Section 4.1  
Requirement Related Title  
SofiHub Features  

Role  
Elderly Person  
Requirement ID  
FR-04  
Requirement Title  
Human-in-the-Loop Feedback Mechanism for Anomalous Behavior Alerts  
Requirement Description  
The system shall detect anomalous behaviour (e.g., user spending abnormal time in bed) and issue alerts to notify carers or service providers, with escalation to emergency assistance.  
Citation  
Page 7, Section 4.1  
Requirement Related Title  
SofiHub Features  

Role  
Elderly Person  
Requirement ID  
FR-05  
Requirement Title  
User Input Interface for Sensor Data Validation  
Requirement Description  
The system shall allow elderly users to validate sensor data through weekly face-to-face interviews where sensor-recorded data (motion, door openings, temperature, humidity) is cross-checked against user-provided checklists.  
Citation  
Page 8, Section 4.3.1  
Requirement Related Title  
Data Collection Tools  

Role  
Carer  
Requirement ID  
FR-06  
Requirement Title  
Visualization Tool for Remote Monitoring  
Requirement Description  
The system shall provide a carer UI for family and carers to check on user activity and receive customizable reports summarizing user behaviour, including health and safety information.  
Citation  
Page 7, Section 4.1  
Requirement Related Title  
SofiHub Features  

Role  
Elderly Person  
Requirement ID  
FR-07  
Requirement Title  
Human-in-the-Loop Feedback Mechanism for Emergency Assistance  
Requirement Description  
The system shall provide emergency assistance by detecting anomalies and alerting carers or service providers, with the ability to summon help in situations escalating to emergencies.  
Citation  
Page 7, Section 4.1  
Requirement Related Title  
SofiHub Features  

Role  
Elderly Person  
Requirement ID  
NF-01  
Requirement Title  
Usability for Elderly Users  
Requirement Description  
The system shall be designed to be well integrated into the daily lives of elderly users, minimizing complexity and ensuring it feels part of their routine without being annoying or obtrusive.  
Citation  
Page 10, Section 5.2.3  
Requirement Related Title  
System is Integrated in User’s Life  

Role  
Elderly Person  
Requirement ID  
NF-02  
Requirement Title  
Cognitive Load Limits  
Requirement Description  
The system shall limit the number of messages to only morning messages and medication reminders to avoid overwhelming users and maintain a sense of control.  
Citation  
Page 7, Section 4.2  
Requirement Related Title  
SofiHub Emotion-Oriented Requirements Engineering  

Role  
Elderly Person  
Requirement ID  
NF-03  
Requirement Title  
Response Time for Emergency Alerts  
Requirement Description  
The system shall respond promptly to generate alerts in case of emergencies, with concerns noted about delays in playing messages due to power failures or dislodgement.  
Citation  
Page 11, Section 5.2.7  
Requirement Related Title  
Emotional Threats  

Role  
Elderly Person  
Requirement ID  
NF-04  
Requirement Title  
Accessibility for Elderly Users  
Requirement Description  
The system shall be accessible to elderly users living independently, using non-intrusive motion sensors to avoid feelings of being old or dependent, and ensuring privacy of data.  
Citation  
Page 2, Section 1  
Requirement Related Title  
Introduction
